title: SecuredTypeEnum
description: Specifies the type of secured debt.

oneOf.title: AssetBacked
oneOf.description: Debt instrument with periodic income payments and value derived from or backed by a specified pool of underlying assets.

oneOf.title: CollateralizedObligation
oneOf.description: Complex product that is backed by a pool of loans and other assets and sold to institutional investors.

oneOf.title: CoveredBonds
oneOf.description: Specifies a debt obligations issued by credit institutions which offer a so-called double-recourse protection to bondholders.
